summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BEAVER marketing site (backend + frontend). All 16 backend API endpoints passed 100%. All 10 frontend user stories passed successfully including quiz flow (15 questions), demo requests, contact form, and responsive mobile navigation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health - MongoDB connected
Backend: GET /api/pipeline - 3 steps, 9 defects, 4 scoring classes
Backend: GET /api/defects - 9 defect classes returned
Backend: GET /api/scoring - 4 scoring classes returned
Backend: GET /api/quiz/questions - 4 product types, 6 quality classes, 15 questions
Backend: POST /api/quiz/submit - Empty answers rejected with 400
Backend: POST /api/quiz/submit - All correct answers (15/15) returns 100% score
Backend: POST /api/quiz/submit - Mixed answers (11/15) returns 73.3% score
Backend: GET /api/quiz/results - Returns list of results
Backend: POST /api/contact - Valid contact creation works
Backend: POST /api/contact - Invalid email rejected with 422
Backend: POST /api/contact - Missing message rejected with 422
Backend: GET /api/contact - Returns list of contacts
Backend: POST /api/demo-requests - Valid demo request creation works
Backend: POST /api/demo-requests - Missing required fields rejected with 422
Backend: GET /api/demo-requests - Returns list of demo requests
Frontend: Home page hero with live badge, H1, stats (9/40/4), and CTAs
Frontend: Home sections - Pipeline (3 cards), Defects (9 cards), Video, Scoring (4 classes), Final CTA
Frontend: Quiz navigation from home page works
Frontend: Quiz intro with 4 product types (B/F/S/P) and start button
Frontend: Quiz flow - All 15 questions answerable with progress bar
Frontend: Quiz email screen with skip and submit options
Frontend: Quiz results with score, percentage, tier, and 15 detailed results
Frontend: Demo dialog opens, form submission works, dialog closes on success
Frontend: Contact page form submission works with success message
Frontend: Header navigation (Accueil/Quiz/Contact) works correctly
Frontend: Mobile responsive - burger menu toggle and navigation work
